authority_ledger.jurisdiction_scope: Inherent individual sovereignty that predates statutory creation.
Establishes the three branches of state government, including the limits of the judiciary.
authority_ledger.legal_weight: Supreme state authority bounding all courts

authority_ledger.document_title: Revised Code of Washington (RCW) Title 2 - Courts of Record
authority_ledger.jurisdiction_scope: Legislative organization of the Superior Court and delegation of record-keeping duties to the County Clerk.
Governs public access to digital court records via administrative portals.
authority_ledger.legal_weight: Strictly limited to data handling; cannot create new laws
